CalibrationStatus.description: A session collects while OPEN and is scored once, on CLOSE. Results exist only if CLOSED.
CalibrationStatus.title: CalibrationStatus

CalibrationVignette.description: A shared case excerpt and the anchors it asks assessors to rate.
CalibrationVignette.title: CalibrationVignette

MaturityLevel.description:
The four maturity levels (Methodology §3.1).

The numeric ``index`` is for computation only; clients see the label. These four indices
are the ONLY legal subcomponent indices — any other value is a contract violation, not a
datum to clamp or round (ADR-0001 §1).
MaturityLevel.title: MaturityLevel

VignetteAnchor.description:
One thing a vignette asks an assessor to rate: a subcomponent, with the facilitator's
reference level (the 'model answer' — used for Practice Arena scoring and misgrading direction,
not for the inter-rater coefficients, which are assessor-vs-assessor).
VignetteAnchor.title: VignetteAnchor

description:
A calibration round owned by its facilitator. Holds the shared vignettes; its status gates
blind (OPEN collects, CLOSED reveals); the computed result is stamped on close.

owner_consultant_id.description: The consultant who owns this resource. Data scoping is by this field, enforced in the repository layer and tested from day one.
owner_consultant_id.title: Owner Consultant Id

title: CalibrationSession
